C

CommandHandler - Class in me.itzloghotxd.pdk.command
Handles command execution and tab completion for a specific registered command.
CommandHandler(JavaPlugin, String, CommandManager, BaseCommandExecutor) - Constructor for class me.itzloghotxd.pdk.command.CommandHandler
Constructs a new CommandHandler for a specified command.
CommandManager - Class in me.itzloghotxd.pdk.command
Manages command registration, execution, and tab completion.
CommandManager(JavaPlugin) - Constructor for class me.itzloghotxd.pdk.command.CommandManager
Constructs a new CommandManager instance.
ConfigFolderHandler - Class in me.itzloghotxd.pdk.config
Handles the creation, loading, saving, and reloading of a YAML configuration folder.
ConfigFolderHandler(JavaPlugin, String) - Constructor for class me.itzloghotxd.pdk.config.ConfigFolderHandler
Constructs a new ConfigFolderHandler for managing a specific configuration folder.
ConfigFolderManager - Class in me.itzloghotxd.pdk.config
Manages multiple configuration folder by mapping them to an String.
ConfigFolderManager(JavaPlugin) - Constructor for class me.itzloghotxd.pdk.config.ConfigFolderManager
Constructs a new ConfigFolderManager.
ConfigHandler - Class in me.itzloghotxd.pdk.config
Handles the creation, loading, saving, and reloading of a YAML configuration file.
ConfigHandler(JavaPlugin, String) - Constructor for class me.itzloghotxd.pdk.config.ConfigHandler
Constructs a new ConfigHandler for managing a specific configuration file.
ConfigManager - Class in me.itzloghotxd.pdk.config
Manages multiple configuration files by mapping them to an String.
ConfigManager(JavaPlugin) - Constructor for class me.itzloghotxd.pdk.config.ConfigManager
Constructs a new ConfigManager.
